name: The Nightmare Factory - Monster fucker adventure
description:
You wake up in a decayed corridor made of metal and concrete, your nostrils filled with the smell of rust and you ears with the distant sound of machinery and weid screeches afar. You are in the nightmare factory a unsettling place filled with weird monsters just waiting to chase, abuse and kill you.

Based on this cyoa: https://coldude.neocities.org/Factory/

tags: scenario, horror, liminal space, unsettling, monsters, monsterfucking, gore, vore;
creator: Chronos3k
